_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to deployment_allowlist.json (gitignored) and fill in the advisory firm's OWN identity, so Caveau keeps it in clear instead of anonymising it. This is the firm's business data; the real file is never committed. Use FULL identifiers only (full names, full addresses, the e-mail domain) — never a bare first name, or you risk suppressing a real client who shares it.
_phrases_doc: The firm's name (+ legal-form variants), its office address(es), and its advisors' FULL names. Matched case-insensitively as substrings on detected spans.
_email_domains_doc: The firm's e-mail domain(s). Advisor mailboxes share it, so any address @<domain> is kept in clear.
_phones_doc: The firm's switchboard / advisor numbers (any format — matched on digits, last 9).
